DISCOVERY 301, DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF CESAR BARRETO TO SERVE RESPONSES TO WRITTEN DISCOVERY IS GRANTED. GOOD CAUSE SHOWN AND NO OPPOSITION FILED. PLAINTIFF MUST SERVE VERIFIED CODE-COMPLIANT RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTIONS TO THE UBER'S FIRST SETS OF FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND DOCUMENT REQUESTS AND PRODUCE ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 11, 2026. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COOURT'S RULING. VISITING JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (301/HEK)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar May-20-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT GULSHAN GOHRI'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS

Appearances:
Alexander Promm of Hinshaw & Culbertson LLP (415.362.6000, apromm@hinshawlaw.com) appearing via Zoom for defendant Gulshan Rai Gohri;
Cesar Augusto Portela Barreto (650.623.2039, portelacesar210@gmail.com) plaintiff appearing in propria persona, assisted in the spanish language by court certified interpreter Patrice Binaisa.

Argued. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion for judgment on the pleadings is granted. Plaintiff's admissions conclusively establish that defendant Gulshan Gohri is entitled to judgment on the three causes of action asserted against him in the complaint. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses To Defendant Gulshan Ghori'S Special Interrogatories, Form Interrogatories, Requests For Admission And Request For Production Of Documents, Set One By Plaintiff Cesar Augusto Portela Barreto; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Mar-11-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT GULSHAN RAI GOHRI'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT GULSHAN GHORI'S SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, FORM INTERROGATORIES, REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE BY PLAINTIFF CESAR AUGUSTO PORTELA BARRETO

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion to compel plaintiff Cesar Augusto Portela Barreto to respond to defendant Gulshan Ghori's Form Interrogatories, Set One, Special Interrogatories, Set One, Request for Production of Documents, Set One, and Requests for Admission, Set One, is granted in part. The remedy for failing to respond to RFAs is a deemed-admitted order. The motion is otherwise granted. (See Code Civ. Proc., secs. 2030.290, subd. (c), 2031.300, subd. (c).) Plaintiff shall provide complete, objection-free responses within 20 days of notice of entry of this order. Defendant does not seek sanctions. Order submitted for review. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)

Notice Of Motion And Motion By Defendant Gulshan Rai Gohri To Have Requests For Admission To Plaintiff, Set One, Be Deemed Admitted; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Mar-11-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: MOTION BY DEFENDANT GULSHAN RAI GOHRI TO HAVE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION TO PLAINTIFF, SET ONE, BE DEEMED ADMITTED

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion for a deemed-admitted order as to defendant Gulshan Ghori's first set of requests for admissions to plaintiff Cesar Augusto Portela Barreto is granted. Plaintiff failed to timely respond to the requests and has not responded to them. (Code Civ. Proc., sec. 2033.280.) Sanctions are mandatory in this circumstance. (Id., sec. 2033.280, subd. (c).) The court orders plaintiff to pay $100 to defendant within 30 days of notice of entry of this order. Order submitted for review. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Cesar Augusto Portela Barreto'S Responses To Written Discovery; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Robert Altomare
Off Calendar Jan-14-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC., RASIER, LLC, RASIER-CA, LLC'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff Cesar Augusto Portela Barreto's Responses To Written Discovery.

Defendant Uber Technologies, Inc.'s motion to compel plaintiff Cesar Barreto to serve responses to written discovery is granted. Good cause shown and no opposition filed. Plaintiff must serve verified code-compliant responses without objections to the Uber's first sets of form interrogatories, special interrogatories and document requests and produce all responsive documents no later than February 11, 2026.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Coourt's ruling.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/HEK)
